query:
ALTER TABLE `orders`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `tenantId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER `id`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `orderSource` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general' AFTER `ecpayTradeNo`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `invoiceType` enum('personal','company') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'personal' AFTER `orderSource`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `companyTaxId` varchar(8) NULL AFTER `invoiceType`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `companyName` varchar(200) NULL AFTER `companyTaxId`;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `invoiceType` enum('personal','company') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'personal' AFTER `orderSource`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `companyTaxId` varchar(8) NULL AFTER `invoiceType`,
